<!-- Created: 2026-06-16 -->
# Sigsum test fixtures

`sigsum-proof.json` is generated by **sigsum-go v0.11.1** (authoritative) via
`gen-sigsum-fixture.go`, with fixed key seeds (0x11 submitter, 0x22 log, 0x33/0x44
witnesses) → deterministic. A size-1 tree (root == leaf hash) exercising the full
Sigsum-specific crypto: leaf signing, RFC 6962 leaf hash, log-signed checkpoint,
and two witness cosignatures.

It is INDEPENDENT of our TS verifier: sigsum-go produced it, `sigsum.ts` verifies
it. Agreement = our wire-format transcription matches sigsum-go exactly.

## Regenerate
```bash
cd /tmp && mkdir sigfix && cd sigfix
cat > go.mod <<'G'
module sigfix
go 1.22
require sigsum.org/sigsum-go v0.11.1
G
cp <this-dir>/gen-sigsum-fixture.go main.go
go mod tidy
# macOS: external linker + ad-hoc codesign avoids the dyld LC_UUID abort
CGO_ENABLED=1 go build -ldflags=-linkmode=external -o sigfix . && codesign -s - -f sigfix
./sigfix > sigsum-proof.json
```
